name: Envipro Holdings Inc.
summary: Envipro Holdings Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the recycling of scrap metals and industrial waste discharged from factories and demolition properties in Japan and internationally. The company recycles and sells iron scrap, nonferrous metals, plastics, rubber, and other recycling resources; lithium-ion rechargeable batteries; and used automobiles, heavy machinery, engines, and other automobile parts. The company also offers logistics services; woody biomass fuels; and environmental management consulting services. The company was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Fujinomiya, Japan.
